summary: Completed testing of HevaPOS Audit/Void Log system - Iteration 23. All 15 backend tests PASSED. Frontend Audit Log page verified at /audit with all features working: summary cards (Events Today, Cancellations in red, Edits in amber, Top Actor), color-coded entries (red=cancellations, blue=creations, amber=KDS), SECURITY badge on critical entries, action filter dropdown with 9 options, cancellation details showing reason/original total/itemized list. Sidebar shows Audit Log link with Shield icon. Regression tests passed for POS (12 products, 81 pending), KDS (16 tickets, avg prep 1:51), and QR Guest Menu (/menu/rest_demo_1/KrGTedTy loads without auth).

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - recharts container sizing issue (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: audit.py: Well-structured audit log system with proper helper function log_audit() for reuse across routers
orders.py: Audit logging properly integrated on create, edit, cancel, complete, and sync operations
kds.py: Audit logging on all KDS status changes (acknowledged, preparing, ready)
AuditLog.js: Clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes, color-coded entries, and filter functionality
Sidebar.js: Audit Log link properly added with Shield icon in restaurantAdminMenu
seed_data_creation: Created test orders and cancellations during backend testing to verify audit log generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 Audit Log feature fully verified. Audit page at /audit shows: Shield icon header, summary cards (Events Today, Cancellations in red, Edits in amber, Top Actor), action filter dropdown (All Actions, Cancellations, Edits, Completions, Creations, KDS Acknowledged, KDS Preparing, KDS Ready, Offline Syncs), color-coded entries by action type, SECURITY badge on cancellation/void entries, cancellation details with reason/original_total/items list. Backend APIs: GET /api/audit/logs (paginated with filters), GET /api/audit/logs/summary (today's stats). Audit logging integrated in orders.py (create/edit/cancel/complete/sync) and kds.py (acknowledge/preparing/ready). All previous features (POS, KDS, QR ordering, dashboard) still working.
